Appearance

PSCompletions

A completion manager for better and simpler use completions in PowerShell.

About module command
About the structure of json file
About PR (Pull Request)

Multi-language

Switch between languages(zh-CN,en-US...) freely.

Sort dynamically

Sort completion tab dynamically by frequency of use.

New Completions menu

The module provides a more useful completion menu

Base-in-json

Define completion data from json files.
